summary: Driver-Seller Coordination Flow testing completed. Backend APIs (14/14 tests passed). Frontend fixed critical runtime error with delivery_address object rendering. Both driver and food seller dashboards working correctly.

fixed_issues.issue: React runtime error: Objects are not valid as React child (delivery_address object)
fixed_issues.fix: Added typeof check to handle object vs string delivery_address

critical_code_review_comments: delivery_address field can be either a string or an object with keys {area, street, building, floor, lat, lng}. All frontend components rendering this field should handle both cases.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Driver-Seller Coordination Flow fully tested. Backend APIs working: GET /api/food/orders/delivery/available returns driver_requested_orders, POST /api/food/orders/driver/orders/{order_id}/accept works, POST /api/food/orders/store/orders/{order_id}/set-preparation-time works. Frontend fixed for delivery_address object rendering issue.

delivery_available_api.details: GET /api/food/orders/delivery/available returns single_orders, batch_orders, driver_requested_orders arrays

driver_accept_api.details: POST /api/food/orders/driver/orders/{order_id}/accept accepts order and returns driver info with waiting_for_preparation_time=true

set_preparation_time_api.details: POST /api/food/orders/store/orders/{order_id}/set-preparation-time sets prep time and notifies driver

delivery_available_with_coordinates.details: API returns sorted_by_proximity=true when driver coordinates provided

api_authentication.details: All endpoints require proper authentication (401/403 without token)

frontend_driver_dashboard.details: Driver dashboard loads correctly, shows available orders with accept button

frontend_food_seller_dashboard.details: Food seller dashboard loads correctly, shows orders with filters and status
